heading: AI-Powered Development Workflow
step1Description: Copilot CLI spawns explore agents to analyze your codebase, discover existing patterns, and understand context before touching a single file.
step2Description: AI creates a structured implementation plan and confirms requirements with you at one touchpoint. You approve, then hands-free execution begins.
step3Description: general-purpose agents write production-ready code following AGENTS.md conventions — correct layer, correct naming, correct import ordering.
step4Description: code-review agent validates architecture compliance, security, and naming conventions. Issues are self-healed without human intervention.
step5Description: Type-safe, lint-clean, test-covered, and zero-bug. The only thing left for you is to review the final output.
subheading: This template is built for GitHub Copilot CLI. Every feature is delivered end-to-end with zero manual scaffolding.
